# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [Documentation Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-documentation.html): Provides human-readable context and landing pages for the API specification. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [NPMDistribution Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-npmdistribution.html): Handles the packaging and distribution of the OpenAPI assets via the Node.js ecosystem. Architectural overview of the NPMDistribution domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenApiSpecification Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-openapispecification.html): The primary domain responsible for defining the RESTful interface and data models for Supermodel services. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpecification domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
